title: Brand family
lede: KIMES is a family of four exhibitions under one umbrella. KIMES and MedicomteK share medical-equipment heritage — both wordmarks carry the signature slash-cut i. Beauty&Derma and INSPIRE Digital Health each maintain an independent visual identity.

brands.name: KIMES
brands.desc: The flagship medical device and hospital equipment exhibition. Korea's industry anchor since 1980.

brands.name: MedicomteK
brands.desc: Concurrent event covering medical communication technology and connected hospital devices.

brands.name: Beauty&Derma
brands.desc: Aesthetic medicine and dermatology exhibition. Held in Seoul and Busan editions.

brands.name: INSPIRE Digital Health
brands.desc: Digital health innovation conference. Tagline: HEALTH MEETS INNOVATION.
